title: Information about income you earned
meta-description: Your Marketplace application may show information about income you earned.
bite: Your Marketplace application may show information about income you earned.
excerpt: Your Marketplace application may show information about income you earned. This is information we got from a consumer reporting agency, and it reflects your current employment. If it’s accurate, check “This information is correct.” If the information isn’t accurate, select “Edit” or “Remove” to make changes.
content:
Your Marketplace application may show information about income you earned. This is information we got from a consumer reporting agency, and it reflects your current employment. If it’s accurate, check “This information is correct.” If the information isn’t accurate, select “Edit” or “Remove” to make changes.

Learn about income types to include on your application.
